name: Xyzverse
description: XYZVerse is an all-sports memecoin built for sports and esports fans, uniting communities around shared energy and culture. $XYZ runs on BNB Smart Chain, with wallet-based claiming for participants and open market trading for anyone else. It is listed on MEXC, and the token contract can be added to wallets for tracking balances and transfers. The project emphasizes community ownership and entertainment-first value.
